mapper.select: SELECT id AS userId, email, nickname, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, provider, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
nickname = #{request.nickname},
profile_image_url = #{request.profileImageUrl},
WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id AS userId, password, provider, status FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.title, ( SELECT pi.image_url FROM post_images pi WHERE pi.post_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl, u.id AS writerId, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND user_id = #{userId}
